zh.Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾可納達爾
zh.Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean於大約1220年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾可納達爾時，他的父親Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean26歲，母親Unknown22歲。他於大約1240年與Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1300年在蘇格蘭享年82歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland: 苏格兰阿吉爾可納達爾
zh-hans.Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland: 苏格兰阿吉爾易斯爾 本 姆爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean于大约1220年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾可納達爾时，他的父亲Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean26岁，母亲Unknown22岁。他于大约1240年与Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1300年在苏格兰享年82岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Malise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, and Croatian Mališ, Polish Małysz and Malisz (see Malis ).

variants.name: Malis
meanings: Modern name of uncertain origin. It may derive from the second word of the Marian epithet stella maris ‘star of the sea’.

nameMeanings.name: mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a common nickname for bearers of any of the Scottish and Irish patronymic surnames beginning with Mac or Mc, this is now sometimes used as an independent first name, especially in the U.S.

nameMeanings.name: Gilleain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Gillian  .

variants.name: Gillian
meanings: Variant of   Julian  , from which it was differentiated in spelling only in the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean was born about 1220, in Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean, was 26 and his mother, Unknown, was 22. He married Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa about 1240, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1300, in Scotland, at the age of 82, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean est né environ 1220, à Knapdale, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Unknown, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa environ 1240, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1300, à Écosse, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean um 1220 in Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean 26 und seine Mutter Unknown 22. Er hat um 1240 in Scotland Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1300 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean è nato il circa 1220 nel Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Unknown, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa circa 1240, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1300, nel Scotland, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland: スコットランドアルグイルナプダル
ja.Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland: スコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ ムル
ja.Argyll, Scotland: スコットランドアルグイル
ja.lifeSummary: Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLeanが約1220年にスコットランドアルグイルナプダルで生まれた時，父Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLeanは26歳，母Unknownは22歳であった。約1240年にスコットランドでGillise Gille Iosa Maolisaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1300年にスコットランドで82歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean(이)가 대략 1220년 스컷랜드 아그이 냅데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Unknown(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1240년 스컷랜드에서 Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1300년 스컷랜드에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1220–about 1300: tany ho any amin'ny 1220–tany ho any amin'ny 1300

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Unknown, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa aproximadamente 1240, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1300, em Scotland, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean родился около 1220 г. в местности напдеил, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Unknown, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa около 1240 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1300 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

sm.about 1220–about 1300: e tusa o le 1220–e tusa o le 1300

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Malise mac Gilleain MacLean II Chief of Clan MacLean nació aproximadamente 1220, en Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Gilleain Na Tuaighe MacLean I Chief of Clan MacLean, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Unknown, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Gillise Gille Iosa Maolisa aproximadamente 1240, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1300, en Scotland, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
